points.value: Automated observability pipeline (daily digest: error rates, FCIs, DLQ depth) eliminated manual triage — service availability 99.56% → 99.96% (~20 hours recovered annually).

Owned solution discovery for merchant custom sender domain (billing@acme.com): evaluated 3 hosting approaches, authored ADR, designed DKIM/SPF/DMARC verification layer & bounce-visibility pipeline across 4 teams.
Designed invoice aggregation end-to-end: parent-child data model, feature-flag rollout (5%→50%→GA), rollback triggers and DLQ alerting — zero P1 incidents.
Architected progressive API access ramp with phased gating, fraud-signal integration, and automated rollback; designed multi-layer spam detection — spam reduced to <2%.
Webhook delivery architecture (at-least-once guarantees, deduplication, fan-out); adopted by 10% of merchants. Resolved N+1 bottleneck via Redis caching layer — p99 latency improved 1.5×.
Test architecture migration: contract tests + mutation testing, coverage 40%→70%. Scrum Master (1 quarter) — 90% Say-Do ratio.

Evaluated BLE vs RFID trade-offs (range, power, cost, SDK maturity); led migration decision — reduced hardware cost 33%. Designed adapter architecture: Impinj RFID readers → Chronicle Queue → Drools rule engine (runtime-configurable, no redeployment).

Designed spatial data model (zones, reader positions, asset coordinates) + real-time WebSocket location pipeline with interactive floor-plan visualization. Plugin architecture for extensible hardware integrations; 68% CI coverage on event-processing paths.
Diagnosed data access bottleneck across 20-module ERP; redesigned query batching — API response 1200ms → 700ms.
Configurable service-locator pattern; C4 diagrams reduced design review cycle 25%.
Configurable backend routing reducing RTB overhead 10%.
